decisions.decision: Use Patricked-code/MCP as the staging repository until chainsolutions-wealthtech is visible to the GitHub connector.
Prepare organization profile and MCP governance files on branch mcp/migration-governance-setup only.

nextStep: Authorize the GitHub App or explicit organization-scoped token on chainsolutions-wealthtech, then create chainsolutions-wealthtech/.github on branch mcp/org-profile-bootstrap.
